name: Sole Romesco
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, blend tomatoes, chilies, hazelnuts, garlic, mint, and salt until smooth.
2. Add half the oil, drop by drop, while blending, to achieve a thick consistency.
3. With the motor running, add the remaining oil in a steady stream.
4. Turn off the motor.
5. Stir in sherry and vinegar.
6. Rinse and dry sole fillets.
7. Combine flour and salt; mix with pepper.
8. Dust the fillets with the seasoned flour.
9. Dip each fillet in oil or butter.
10. Place fillets on a hot barbecue grill.
11. After 2 to 3 minutes, turn carefully using a metal spatula.
12. After another 2 to 3 minutes, turn the fillets again.
13. During cooking, pour sauce into a bowl and sprinkle with parsley.
14. Serve spooned over piping hot fillets. Makes 4 servings
